testsuite.name: io.slogr.agent.engine.traceroute.TracerouteOrchestratorTest

testcase.name: falls back to UDP when ICMP and TCP are both mostly stars()
ICMP mode used when majority of hops respond()
explicit UDP mode skips ICMP and TCP()
loss pct is 50 when half probes timeout with probesPerHop 2()
isPrivateIp filters RFC 1918 CGNAT loopback link-local multicast()
loss pct is 100 when all probes timeout()
falls back to TCP when ICMP has more than 50 percent timeouts()
